text: Like how even Python experts prefer shell languages when operating their computer interactively, line-by-line?

elements.text: Like how even Python experts prefer shell languages when operating their computer interactively, line-by-line?

text:
Elixir has a good ecosystem for building ML + Web apps including agents all in a single language.

We are currently a team of Python and Typescript developers, but were discussing Elixir this week and liked what we saw so far.

• Has concurrency and fault-tolerance built-in (WhatsApp backend uses the same VM)
• Built-in support for async processes simplifies the stack. Don't need separate process (like Celery) for queues or background jobs or recurring jobs.
• Already has an <https://elixir-lang.org/getting-started/mix-otp/agent.html|Agent> construct which is a wrapper around state.
• <https://github.com/elixir-nx/|Numerical Elixir> lets it invoke models directly (using GPUs while supporting batching, partitioning and streaming)
• <https://hexdocs.pm/phoenix_live_view/welcome.html#example|Phoenix LiveView> (which uses Websockets to stream HTML down to the client) simplifies creation of dynamic webapps while keeping all state management on the server. <https://phoenixframework.org/|Phoenix> is the web application framework.
• <https://hexdocs.pm/phoenix/ecto.html|Ecto> provides data validation and persistence
• <https://livebook.dev/|Livebook> is an interactive notebook
• <https://news.livebook.dev/announcing-bumblebee-gpt2-stable-diffusion-and-more-in-elixir-3Op73O|Bumblebee> - provides easy access to pre-trained models
A couple of demos to showcase the capabilities of this stack:
• LiveView with Phoenix to create a single-page app without writing Javascript: <https://youtu.be/MZvmYaFkNJI>
• NX, Livebook and Bumblebee to use ML models: <https://youtu.be/g3oyh3g1AtQ>

root.text: i feel like python is very limiting for prompt engg/agents. anyone else feel this way? maybe we need more expressive languages/dsls/languages built with editor in mind (like smalltalk).

attachments.text: Phoenix is a web framework for the Elixir programming language that gives you peace of mind from development to production
attachments.title: Phoenix Framework
